description: Subject ID parsed from the sub-<id> folder or filename.
Task label parsed from the task-<task> entity in the report filename.
1 if any component table in the report has Predicted Label == "brain" with Max Prob > 0.9 within the first 5 rows; else 0.
1 if any component table in the report has at least 20 rows with Predicted Label == "brain" within the first 30 rows; else 0.
1 if any component table in the report has more than 10 "brain" rows and fewer than 5 "other" rows within the first 20 rows; else 0.
1 if any component table in the report has fewer than 10 "other" rows within the first 30 rows; else 0.
1 if any component table in the report has between 2 and 5 "eye blink" rows within the first 10 rows; else 0.
1 if any component table in the report has all "eye blink" rows marked "Excluded" == "yes" within the first 15 rows; else 0.
